title: marantochloa flexuosa
intro: Marantochloa flexuosa, also known as the West African fern, is a type of flowering plant native to West Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Marantochloa flexuosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in the form of a tincture or salve for topical applications.
